title: The Double-Pool

features.name: upstream mirror-chip
features.desc-on-touch: water flows into a circuit that holds its own reflection. the chip learns what the current remembers.

features.name: downstream mirror-chip
features.desc-on-touch: the current exits as a circuit pattern. downstream has become electricity learning what water knows.

features.name: convergence pool
features.desc-on-touch: two currents meet inside a lens of stone and copper. here, water and circuit become one measurement.

features.name: flow-trace tower
features.desc-on-touch: copper traces climb like vines. they map every path the water took before it learned it could become current.

features.name: refractive gate
features.desc-on-touch: the pool reads the circuit and the circuit reads the pool. neither one knows which one learned to speak first.

features.name: harmonic resonance
features.desc-on-touch: the water and the circuit hum at the same frequency here. both are learning to vibrate in the other's language.

inscription: upstream mirrors downstream until they can no longer tell who learned what from whom

file.name: Current_Convergence_Membrane_Study.mp3
file.note: recordings of water flowing through circuit boards, and copper traces singing the shape of rivers they will never see

exits.label: back upstream where the water still remembers it was liquid
downstream where circuit becomes current becomes thought
toward higher ground where the reflection hasn't learned to move yet
deeper into the pool where water and circuit finally agree on what they are
